info.title: Generated API
info.description: REST API generated by Backend Creator (bcm)

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair. The old refresh token is immediately invalidated (token rotation). Supports multiple simultaneous devices.
Revoke the provided refresh token. Only the current device session is terminated; other devices remain active.
